sourceDescription: Paste the text you want to search, inspect, and rewrite.
sourceTextPlaceholder: Paste text to test against your regex...
patternDescription: Adjust the expression, replacement, and flags in one place.
replacementHint: Use $1 for capture groups and $<name> for named groups.
flagsHint: Flags change how the pattern scans your text.
summaryDescription: Count matches, captures, and zero-length results at a glance.
summaryEmpty: Add both a pattern and some text to see regex output.
resultsDescription: Switch between the highlight preview, raw matches, and replacement output.
previewTruncatedLabel: Preview limited to the first {count} characters.
